subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants of the Blessed Beauty! Though in the path of the Beloved ye have suffered manifold afflictions and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بندهٴ صادق جمال مبارک هرچند در سبیل محبوب مصائب و متاعب موفوره دیدید
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @high station of the true believer
